 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-15; format=flowed
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 Same problem for me. Compilation completed but installation failed due=20
 missing scheam.gecko... files.
 
 Deleting the lines in Makefile with "GLIB_SCHEMAS=3D ....." solve the pro=
 blem.
 
 Best regards
 
 Stefan
 
 stefan@BiXi:/home/stefan % uname -a
 FreeBSD BiXi.Manteuffel 10.0-STABLE FreeBSD 10.0-STABLE #0: Thu Mar 13=20
 21:29:54 CET 2014     root@BiXi.Manteuffel:/tmp/usr/src/sys/BiXi  amd64
